name: EaseMyTrip Credit Card

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per calendar quarter
international: 2 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of ₹50,000 or more in the previous year
additionalBenefits: 20% instant discount on hotels and 10% off on flights on EaseMyTrip using promo code EMTSCB
Flat ₹125 off on bus bookings (min transaction ₹500) on EaseMyTrip
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
10X rewards (10 points / ₹100) apply specifically to standalone airline and hotel bookings, excluding aggregators. Aggregators earn base rate.
Base rate is 2 points / ₹100 spent (effectively 0.5% return value).
EaseMyTrip discounts require using the promo code EMTSCB.
